prompt: A dark abandoned mine tunnel with old wooden support beams framing the passage. Rusty rail tracks run along the floor into the darkness. Rough rock walls with mineral veins are visible. A mining cart silhouette sits in the distance. Dust particles float in the air, scattering any light into visible cones (Tyndall effect). Stark contrast between illuminated and pitch-dark areas. To the left, a branching side tunnel is partially collapsed with fallen timber and rubble, revealing a flooded lower section where water reflects the flashlight beam. Ahead past the mining cart, a rusted ventilation shaft opening is set into the ceiling with cobwebs hanging from its grate. First-person viewer. First-person view with the right hand holding a yellow cylindrical flashlight, its beam cutting diagonally through the dusty air to illuminate the tunnel ahead.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A dark abandoned mine tunnel with old wooden support beams framing the passage. Rusty rail tracks run along the floor into the darkness. Rough rock walls with mineral veins are visible. A mining cart silhouette sits in the distance. Dust particles float in the air, scattering any light into visible cones (Tyndall effect). Stark contrast between illuminated and pitch-dark areas.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the left, a branching side tunnel is partially collapsed with fallen timber and rubble, revealing a flooded lower section where water reflects the flashlight beam. Ahead past the mining cart, a rusted ventilation shaft opening is set into the ceiling with cobwebs hanging from its grate.
